name: Stalker Portal Toolbox
description: All-in-One Stalker (Ministra) portal utility. Encompasses dynamic stream redirection proxying, portal testing, port scanning, subdomain checks, custom MAC generation, and high-speed range scanning.
author: Antigravity

fields.label: ⚙️ [ SEKTION 1: CORE CONFIG & MULTI-PORTALS ] ─────────────────────────
fields.description: General settings, configured Stalker portals, and M3U playlist integration.

fields.label: Proxy Port
fields.help_text: Port on which the local stalker redirect proxy runs. Must be free.

fields.label: Portals JSON Configuration
fields.help_text: JSON list containing Stalker portals. Ex: [{"name":"p1", "url":"http://url:80", "mac":"00:1A:79:XX:XX:XX", "active":true}]. Click Save Settings after editing.

fields.label: Bulk Import Text / Paste Bin
fields.help_text: Paste raw text from forums or log files containing URL and MAC combos, then run the 'Bulk Import Combos' action.

fields.label: Max VOD Items per Category
fields.help_text: Limits the number of movies fetched per category to keep sync fast. Set to 0 for unlimited.

fields.label: Max Series per Category
fields.help_text: Limits the number of TV shows fetched per category. Set to 0 for unlimited.

fields.label: 🕵️ [ SEKTION 2: PORTAL DETECTIVE ] ────────────────────────────────────
fields.description: Forensic scanner to check portal online status, resolve IPs, find subdomains, probe open ports, discover admin pages, and check Cloudflare protections.

fields.label: urlscan.io API Key (Optional)
fields.help_text: Optional API Key for urlscan.io to search for co-hosted portals/panels on the same server IP.

fields.label: Enumerate Subdomains
fields.help_text: Enable brute-forcing common subdomains (www, api, secure, tv, stream) to find hidden servers.

fields.label: Port Scan Server
fields.help_text: Enable scanning standard IPTV ports (80, 443, 8080, 8880, 25461, etc.) to discover other open ports.

fields.label: 🔢 [ SEKTION 3: MAC ADDRESS GENERATOR ] ──────────────────────────────
fields.description: Generate unique MAC address combo files using standard IPTV vendor prefixes.

fields.label: MAC Prefixes
fields.help_text: Prefixes to use, separated by commas (e.g. '00:1A:79:,74:1A:79:,D4:CF:F9:').

fields.label: MAC Count per Prefix
fields.help_text: Number of MAC addresses to generate for each prefix.

fields.label: Suffix Start (Optional)
fields.help_text: Starting suffix (e.g. '00:00:00'). Leave blank for default.

fields.label: Suffix Finish (Optional)
fields.help_text: Ending suffix (e.g. 'FF:FF:FF'). Leave blank for default.

fields.label: Output Filename
fields.help_text: The generated file will be saved in your data directory under this name.

fields.label: 🔍 [ SEKTION 4: MAC ADDRESS RANGE SCANNER ] ───────────────────────────
fields.description: Concurrently scan a range of MAC addresses for subscription status on a portal.

fields.label: Scan Target Portal Name
fields.help_text: Name of the portal config to scan (must be present in Section 1).

fields.label: Scan Threads (Concurrency)
fields.help_text: Number of concurrent scanning threads (1 to 15).

fields.label: 🔗 [ SEKTION 5: SOCKS5/HTTP PROXY ROTATOR ] ─────────────────────────
fields.description: Upload/paste proxy lists to rotate connections through HTTP, HTTPS, SOCKS4, or SOCKS5 proxies. SOCKS5h is recommended for DNS routing.

fields.label: Proxies List (Paste Bin)
fields.help_text: Paste your list of proxies, one per line (e.g. '192.168.1.100:1080' or 'socks5h://user:password@proxy.com:1080'). If protocol is omitted, 'socks5h://' is assumed.

fields.label: Proxy list URLs (e.g. GitHub)
fields.help_text: Paste links to raw text files containing proxies (one URL per line, e.g. from GitHub). They will be automatically fetched, parsed, and merged with the Paste Bin list.

actions.label: Bulk Import Combos
actions.description: Parses Paste Bin and appends parsed portals to your Portals JSON configuration.

actions.label: Test Connections
actions.description: Performs handshakes and profile checks for all configured portals.

actions.label: Sync Playlists
actions.description: Fetches channels from active portals and registers them as M3U Accounts in Dispatcharr.

actions.label: Run Portal Detective
actions.description: Investigates target URL, searches admin portals, port scans, resolves ASN/IP, and writes report to /data/stalker_detective_<domain>.txt.

actions.label: Generate MACs
actions.description: Generates a list of MAC addresses and saves it to your output file in /data/.

actions.label: Scan MAC Range
actions.description: Concurrently scans the MAC range on the selected portal. Results are written to /data/stalker_scan_results.txt.

actions.label: Get Scan Status
actions.description: Returns the current MAC scanner status.

actions.label: Fetch Portal Categories
actions.description: Helper to retrieve available genres and categories for a configured portal.

actions.label: Prune Offline Portals
actions.description: Removes all configured portals that are offline or failed the connection test.
